name: devflow
description: Structured architecture, plan, dev, and review workflow for large development tasks with task state and markdown artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, architect, build, and review complex engineering work
interface.longDescription: Coordinate complex software tasks through architecture discovery plus an explicit plan, implementation, and review workflow with persisted task state and markdown artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Use DevFlow to start a tracked implementation task
Use DevFlow Architect to turn this feature request into executable architecture docs
Create a DevFlow architecture package for this system and then bind a task to one module
Resume the active DevFlow task and tell me the next action
Run DevFlow review or complete the current task
